title: Scaling TechFlow to Series B: From Fragmented Sales to Unified Engine
summary: How we rebuilt a fragmented HubSpot setup into a unified Revenue Engine, driving a 220% increase in revenue in 90 days.

content.title: The Situation: Chaos at Scale
content.body: TechFlow had raised their Series A but was stalling. They had 3 different CRMs, no unified data layer, and their sales team was spending 40% of their time on manual data entry.

content.title: The Diagnosis: Use Case Fracture
content.body: We audited their engine and found a critical 'Leaky Bucket' in the Consideration phase. Leads were being generated but weren't being nurtured. The 'Speed to Lead' was over 4 hours.

content.title: The Architecture: The Unified Engine
content.body: We implemented a Battleship-tier architecture. 1. Unified Hubspot as the source of truth. 2. Automated the 'Speed to Lead' to < 5 minutes using n8n workflows. 3. Implemented a 12-touch nurture sequence.

title: Automating Agency Operations: Reclaiming 40 Hours/Week
summary: Implemented the 5-Stage Journey to automate client onboarding and reporting, freeing up the founders to focus on strategy.

content.title: The Situation: Founder Bottleneck
content.body: The founders were doing everything. Onboarding, reporting, and fulfillment. They were capped at $50k MRR because they physically couldn't handle more clients.

content.title: The Diagnosis: Retention Failure
content.body: Clients were churning because the onboarding experience was manual and slow. The 'Excitement' phase of the relationship was being wasted on paperwork.

content.title: The Architecture: Self-Driving Operations
content.body: We built a client portal that automated intake. We connected ClickUp to Slack to automate reporting. We virtually eliminated the admin burden.
